code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
    let n = parts.len()
    mut i = 0
    mut best = 0
    mut best_abs = 0
    mut found = false
    while i < n
      match parts.get(i)
      when Some(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          mut a = v
          if a < 0
            a = 0 - a
          end
          if not found
            best = v
            best_abs = a
            found = true
          else
            if a < best_abs
              best = v
              best_abs = a
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("min_abs=#{best}")
  when None
    ()
  end
end
